channel.title: Big Wall on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Big Wall on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Jamaica Brief – Cousin Leroy: Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Cousin Leroy flew in for carnival, somehow did not know about the Big Wall shooting until Tuesday, and has questions about Negril's ambulance situation.

item.title: Jamaica Brief – Yard Report: Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Carnival ended with gunshots, a boy got shot by a cop on a rooftop, the justice minister told JPs to stop profiling, and Domino's has a new owner. Tuesday's Kingston dispatch.
